diagrams.title: 8051 Internal RAM Map
diagrams.description: Shows the 128-byte internal RAM organization with register banks, bit-addressable area, and general purpose RAM
diagrams.purpose: Understand memory organization and register placement

diagrams.title: PSW Register Bit Layout
diagrams.description: 8-bit Program Status Word showing all flag positions and their meanings
diagrams.purpose: Learn flag positions for conditional operations

diagrams.title: Register Bank Selection Logic
diagrams.description: Shows how RS1 and RS0 bits select different register banks

diagrams.title: Timer SFR Interconnection
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between TMOD, TCON, TH, and TL for timer operation
diagrams.purpose: Understand timer configuration and control flow
